candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue line and appears to match total revenue values exactly.
Explicit total revenue line; same values as the contracts-with-customers revenue row, so useful as fallback.
Operating income, not core revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the two equivalent revenue labels as a priority list because they appear to represent the same top-line across periods.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs and appears above operating profit.
Explicit COGS label, but only populated in one preview year.
Inventory asset, not an income statement expense.

variables.notes: Chose the more consistently reported direct-cost line and avoided summing alternative labels.

candidates.why: Core overhead bucket covering staff/admin costs.
Broad operating overhead bucket excluding direct materials and D&A.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Looks like SG&A-related overhead, but may already be embedded in broader expense buckets, so double-count risk exists.

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A subtotal is present. Selected the two main overhead buckets and excluded depreciation/amortization, impairment, and balancing rows. Excluded the stock-based compensation row to avoid possible double counting within broader operating expense buckets.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related label exists, but it is amortization of capitalized R&D and shown as supplemental, not a dedicated current-period R&D expense line.

variables.notes: No suitable dedicated R&D expense line is reported on the income statement. The only R&D-related row is supplemental amortization, which should not be used as XRD expense.

candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense component.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring lease-related interest expense component.
May capture recurring financing costs; more ambiguous than explicit interest rows but preferable to total financial expenses when granular rows exist.
Likely finance-cost component in at least one year; ambiguous but potentially recurring.
Total finance-cost line likely includes FX and other non-interest items, so less preferred than components.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost rows and excluded total financial expenses to avoid including FX loss and impairment items. Excluded the supplemental lease-interest row as a duplicate of the main row.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of parent
candidates.why: Best book equity measure excluding non-controlling interests, as required.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred for BE when parent-only equity exists.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive-income attribution line, not balance sheet equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of parent

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet minority-interest line.
Equivalent balance sheet label also present, but appears duplicative of the plural line.
Income statement attribution line, not the preferred balance sheet minority-interest balance.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet non-controlling interests line and avoided duplicate alternative labels.
